tasks.subject: Task 0: outliers.py core (config, masks, filter_outliers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure outlier detection module.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/outliers.py, tests/test_outliers.py

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_outliers.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/outliers.py", "tests/test_outliers.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_outliers.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["range/zscore/iqr masks", "filter_outliers union + report", "empty-safe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: bin/_outlier_cli.py shared helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CLI bridge: parse_bound/build_config/filter_frame/make_filter.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py, tests/test_outlier_cli.py

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_outlier_cli.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/_outlier_cli.py", "tests/test_outlier_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_outlier_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_bound", "build_config overrides", "filter_frame enabled/disabled", "bad bound BadParameter", "make_filter callable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Summary integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** summarize filtered param + summary CLI filter-by-default + filtered column.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/summary.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/summary.py, tests/test_summary.py

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_summary.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/summary.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/summary.py", "tests/test_summary.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_summary.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["summarize filtered field", "CLI filters by default + json count", "--no-outlier-filter keeps garbage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Visualize core outlier_filter hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** outlier_filter hook on metric_observations/station_means/mean_map.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize.py

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["filter applied before metric filter", "threaded through means/mean_map", "default unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Visualize CLI wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Six outlier options on all five visualize subcommands; build+pass filter; on by default.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize_cli.py

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/test_visualize_cli.py -v then uv run pytest -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 options on 5 subcommands", "garbage excluded by default / kept with flag", "bad bound non-zero", "full suite green"]}
```
